src: Awesome papers and code about Multi-Camera 3D Occupancy Prediction, such as TPVFormer, SurroundOcc, PanoOcc, OccFormer, FB-OCC, SelfOcc, COTR, SparseOcc, GaussianFormer, GaussianOcc, STCOcc, OccMamba. In this repository, you will see the latest 3D occupancy prediction papers and code.
ja: TPVFormer、SurroundOcc、PanoOcc、OccFormer、FB-OCC、SelfOcc、COTR、SparseOcc、GaussianFormer、GaussianOcc、STCOcc、OccMambaなど、マルチカメラ3D占有予測に関する優れた論文とコード集。最新の3D占有予測論文とコードを掲載。
